title: Mork Borg - The B is for Bestiary!
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D-dgFUvl7YA

Daniel (@dungeondive) explores multiple Mork Borg bestiary supplements including Bestiary by Jake Milner, 40 Fiends by Toby Lancaster, Creatures of the Dying World series by Johnny Blues, Forbidden Wilderness (Cryptids from Fearsome Wilderness), K's Book of Monsters by Phil Reed, and various deck formats including the Endless Demon Deck and Forbidden Psalm Bestiary Deck. He emphasizes that bestiaries are as much fictional works as they are game tools, and discusses how random tables help with encounter generation.

----

What's your go-to bestiary for inspiring encounters, and do you prefer physical books or card decks for quick reference at the table?
